case_title: JULE, ILMA vs. GARCIA, GERTRUDIS AKA TULITA GARCIA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JULE, ILMA AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, GERTRUDIS AKA TULITA GARCIA DOES 1 TO 3 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT GARCIA, GERTRUDIS AKA TULITA GARCIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT GARCIA, GERTRUDIS AKA TULITA GARCIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT GARCIA, GERTRUDIS AKA TULITA GARCIA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GARCIA, GERTRUDIS AKA TULITA GARCIA
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT GARCIA, GERTRUDIS AKA TULITA GARCIA

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JULE, ILMA SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-30-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-07-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KENNEDY, SYLVIA SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR GARCIA, GERTRUDIS AKA TULITA GARCIA

DEPT#8, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON - JOHN LEWIS, CT. RPT. - GUY DECKER, CT. CLERK. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/JACK FENDELL AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/SYLVIA KENNEDY AS COUNSEL & SP. INTERP, LINDA GONZALEZ, AS HER SPANISH INTERPRETOR. SETTLED BY STIP. FOR JUDGMENT WITH JUDGMENT FOR PL. & AGAINST DEF. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 230 27TH ST, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 11-30-96 - PL. TO PAY DEF. $1,000 UPON SIGNING THIS STIP. & $750 AFTER VACAT- ING & RETURNING KEYS - ALL BACK RENTS WVD. IF DEF VACATES - DEF. STIPS TO NO EXCESSIVE NOISE OR COOKING AFTER 10PM - MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS - LETTER OF RECOMMENDATION WILL NOT INCLUDE ANY NEGATIVE COMMENTS - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES - TERMS OF AGREEMENT NOT TO BE DISCLOSED TO 3RD PARTIES - PL. ATTY TO PREPARE STIP & JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, GERTRUDIS AKA TULITA GARCIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 230 27TH ST, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL DEC-01-1996, WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMED. IF DEF VACATES 12-1-96 PL. TO PAY DEF. 1,750($1,000 UPON SIGNING AGREEMENT & $500 UPON VACATING).IF DEF VACATES & RETURNS KEYS PL. TO S/A & VACATE JUDGMENT. PL. TO PROVIDE DEF NEUTRAL LETTER OF RECOMMENDATION. DEF. AGREES TO NO EXCESS NOISE OR COOKING AFTER 10:30PM.MUTUAL RELEASE.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF OCT-17-1996 SET ASIDE
